items.title: OpenAI Launches 'Health in ChatGPT' for Medical Applications
items.summary: OpenAI has officially launched 'Health in ChatGPT,' signaling its expansion into the healthcare sector with new AI capabilities designed for medical use.

items.title: AMD Challenges Nvidia with New Helios AI Rack-Scale System
items.summary: AMD has unveiled its Helios AI rack-scale system, directly competing with Nvidia in the high-performance AI hardware market.

items.title: Anthropic Enhances Claude's Voice Mode with More Capable Models
items.summary: Anthropic has updated its Claude AI, introducing more capable models to its voice mode, improving conversational and interactive experiences.

items.title: Salesforce Rolls Out New Slackbot AI Agent to Compete in Workplace AI
items.summary: Salesforce has launched a new Slackbot AI agent, intensifying its competition with Microsoft and Google in the rapidly growing enterprise workplace AI market.

items.title: Google Expands Gemini API with Managed Agents for Background Tasks and Remote MCP
items.summary: Google is expanding its Gemini API to include managed agents, enabling background tasks, remote MCP, and other advanced functionalities for developers.

items.title: AREX: Towards a Recursively Self-Improving Agent for Deep Research
items.summary: A new research paper introduces AREX, an agent designed for deep research that aims for recursive self-improvement, potentially revolutionizing scientific discovery.

items.title: AI Guardrails Impede Offensive Cybersecurity Research, Raising Concerns
items.summary: AI guardrails are reportedly hindering the work of offensive cybersecurity researchers, sparking debate over the balance between safety and security innovation.

items.title: The Dirty Secret Behind AI Agents (Demo 🚀)
items.summary: A new article and demo reveal a 'dirty secret' about AI agents, likely exposing common limitations or challenges in their current implementations.

items.title: FineServe: A Fine-Grained Dataset and Characterization of Global LLM Serving Workloads
items.summary: Researchers introduce FineServe, a new dataset and characterization study offering fine-grained insights into global LLM serving workloads, crucial for optimizing infrastructure.

items.title: Subliminal Clocks: Latent Time Modelling in Diffusion Language Models
items.summary: New research explores 'Subliminal Clocks,' a method for latent time modeling within diffusion language models, potentially enhancing their temporal understanding and generation capabilities.

items.title: Self Gradient Forcing: Native Long Video Extrapolation
items.summary: A new paper presents 'Self Gradient Forcing,' a novel technique for native long video extrapolation, enabling AI to generate extended video sequences more coherently.

items.title: Stale but Stable: Staleness-Adaptive Trust Regions for Stabilizing Asynchronous Reinforcement Learning
items.summary: This paper introduces staleness-adaptive trust regions to stabilize asynchronous reinforcement learning, addressing challenges in distributed training environments.

items.title: How AI Endpoints Change the Traditional API Flow
items.summary: An article discusses how the integration of AI endpoints is fundamentally altering traditional API flows, introducing new paradigms for data processing and interaction.

items.title: Listen Labs Raises $69M to Scale AI Customer Interviews After Viral Stunt
items.summary: Listen Labs secured $69 million in funding following a viral billboard hiring campaign, aiming to scale its AI-powered customer interview platform.

items.title: Beyond Relevance-Centric Retrieval: Rubric-Oriented Document Set Selection and Ranking
items.summary: New research proposes a rubric-oriented approach to document set selection and ranking, moving beyond traditional relevance-centric retrieval methods for improved information access.
